title: Tile artifact manifest
description: Metadata contract for one immutable tile artifact and its source provenance.

manifest_version.title: Manifest version
manifest_version.description: Semantic version of this manifest contract used by the document.

artifact_id.title: Artifact identifier
artifact_id.description: Stable lowercase identifier for the artifact family.

artifact_version.title: Artifact version
artifact_version.description: Immutable semantic version assigned to a built artifact.

artifact_uri.title: Artifact URI
artifact_uri.description: Published artifact URL, or PENDING_BUILD for an example that has not been built.

owner.title: Artifact owner
owner.description: Authoritative source owner or publisher recorded for the artifact.

name.title: Owner name
name.description: Public name of the authoritative source organization.

url.title: Owner URL
url.description: Canonical public URL for the authoritative source organization.

input_sources.title: Input sources
input_sources.description: One or more primary URLs from which source data or authoritative metadata are obtained.

items.title: Input source URL
items.description: Primary agency URL for an input or its authoritative catalogue record.

vintage.title: Source vintage
vintage.description: Human and machine-readable identification of the source data vintage.

label.title: Vintage label
label.description: Agency release name, edition, or snapshot label.

as_of.title: Vintage date
as_of.description: Date represented by or selected for the source snapshot.

license.title: License and terms
license.description: Recorded reuse terms and their verification state for this source.

name.title: License name
name.description: Official license name or honest description of the applicable public-use terms.

url.title: Terms URL
url.description: Primary agency page containing or identifying the reuse terms.

status.title: Terms status
status.description: Whether the terms were confirmed from a primary source for this dataset.

verified_on.title: Verification date
verified_on.description: Date of primary-source confirmation, or null when status is unverified.

notes.title: Terms notes
notes.description: Concise qualification, required attribution, disclaimer, or reason verification is incomplete.

verified_on.title: Required verification date
verified_on.description: Requires a date when terms are verified.

verified_on.title: Absent verification date
verified_on.description: Requires null when terms are unverified.

attribution.title: Attribution text
attribution.description: Exact human-readable attribution intended to accompany the artifact.

checksum.title: Artifact checksum
checksum.description: SHA-256 identity of the built archive or the documented pre-build sentinel.

algorithm.title: Checksum algorithm
algorithm.description: Digest algorithm required for tile artifacts.

status.title: Checksum status
status.description: Whether the digest is verified or awaits a build.

value.title: Checksum value
value.description: Lowercase SHA-256 digest, or PENDING_BUILD before an archive exists.

layers.title: Layer inventory
layers.description: Inventory of vector layers encoded in the artifact.

items.title: Layer inventory entry
items.description: One encoded layer and the runtime-visible fields it promises.

geometry_types.title: Geometry types
geometry_types.description: Geometry families that may occur in the layer.

items.title: Geometry type
items.description: GeoJSON geometry family represented in vector tiles.

minzoom.title: Minimum zoom
minzoom.description: Lowest zoom at which this layer has tile coverage.

maxzoom.title: Maximum zoom
maxzoom.description: Highest native zoom at which this layer has tile coverage.

attributes.title: Layer attributes
attributes.description: Runtime-visible attribute names retained in this layer.
